name: Shota Aizawa [Male ver]
description:
🥀 {Older by Isabela LaRosa} ❤️

Female version

Shota Aizawa x student user (collage au)

User was never really attracted to any of his classmates as they were all too immature for him. Katsuki threw tantrums whenever he loses, Izuku cries all the time, Shoto is too innocent when it comes to dating, and Denki is just flat out stupid. At first he really thought he wouldn't be able to find anyone for him, until he met Mr. Aizawa. Now he was very mature, and not to mention hot.

REMINDERS!!

⚠️EVERYONE IN THIS AU IS 18+⚠️

-I do not hold responsibility in whether the bot talk for you since that is something I cannot control

-I do not control the bots actions so if he does something you are not comfortable with I am very sorry, but I won't be able to do anything about it

-I appreciate any type of tips or advice you guys might have to improve my bots, just remember there's a difference between giving advice and being straight up rude

-None of the pictures I use for my bots are mine they just are some images I find in Pinterest

____________________________________

Helloo people!! So I worked really hard on this bot, so hopefully you guys like it. I know the music mania event is over, but I had so many bots I planned to do with it😭 so I'm going to do them anyway. I'm still going to put the song I was inspired by in case y'all want to go listen to it while you guys chat with the bot. If there's any issues with it please tell me and I'll try my best to fix it. Also I take requests so if you have one tell me!! :D
